Is this exaggerated ? Yes but the truth is the data still shows significant changes,  •  College debt vs. job market feels brutal for many, many grads say it wasn’t worth the degree they got (outside of STEM)  •  Rent devouring 30-50%+ of your paycheck in a lot of cities •  AI shaking up entry-level roles •  Houses feeling impossible on starter salaries (12-15 years to save)  •  Geopolitical stress on top of everything •  Older gens asking why you’re burned out, when we’re literally fighting for both needs and housing with a decent salary that should’ve covered both easily back then, It’s rough out here. #2jobs #finances #investing #personalfinance #financialfreedom

I got our wedding photos and videos back this week and instead of just being happy and looking at how beautiful the day was my brain went straight to my loose skin in every clip and every photo. 160 pounds down, the best day of my entire life, the man of my dreams, everyone I love in one room and I’m sitting here picking myself apart in the background of my own wedding video. That’s just what years of hating your body does to your brain, it rewires you to scan for everything wrong before you can actually see what’s right and I had to physically stop and make myself look again. Look at that day, look at those moments and memories bad, and look at what this body actually did!!  It walked down the aisle and it danced and it cried happy tears and it got MARRIED with loose skin and stretch marks and it was the best day of my life anyway!! If you’re being hard on yourself right now I just want you to know I get it more than you know and you are not alone in this and it does get easier, you just have to keep trying🫶🏻

Part 1/5 | Top 5 moments from my group safari last year 🦒 This is moment we had all been waiting for. The moment all safari-goers dream of. What most people don’t know is how rare it is to actually witness the infamous great migration river crossing. Travelers spend hours sitting in their vehicles, parked by the river, waiting for the wildebeest herds to muster up enough courage to start their dangerous journey across the Mara River. We had seen this herd the day before and waited around a while hoping they would cross, but ultimately, they didn’t.  The following morning we decided to continue our safari as usual. That’s when the walkie talkie rang.  Less than 5 minutes later, we found ourselves here— witnessing one of the most raw and powerful wildlife spectacles on the planet.  Everyone went quiet. Tears were shed. There are no words to describe the pure awe that we all felt.  Grateful. That’s the only word that comes to mind. This will forever be one of the most magical moments of my life ✨ PS. There are only a few spots left on my group safari this December. Link is in my bio!  #thegreatmigration #serengeti #africansafari #grouptrip

Most claps in one minute 👏 Musician Eli Bishop used his unique technique to achieve this record title in 2014 with 1020 claps, and inspired several young challengers to try and break his record.  In 2016 his record was claimed by Seven Wade Miami, Florida from with 1080 claps. Eli then reclaimed his record in 2018 with 1103. The current record, set in 2022, is 1140 by Dalton Meyer from Illinois, USA.  A big round of applause for all these challengers. Who will be next?

I seriously felt like I was in another country for a second 🤯⬇️ follow for more travel recommendations! 📍 Location: BAPS Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Chinó Hills, California. 🎟️ Parking and Entrance is free 🛕 The Temple: this place is unreal. Everything is made of hand-carved marble and sandstone, and every detail is insane. The pieces were made in India, shipped to the US and assembled like legos here. It’s also an active place of worship, so it’s very peaceful and quiet. Be respectful, this is a sacred place. ⏰ Hours: the mandir is open daily, but the temple itself has specific visiting times (usually 9am–12pm and 4pm–7:30pm). The overall campus/visitor center is open around 9am–7:30pm. 🍽️ Food: they have a café/food court on-site with Indian food and snacks, plus a small shop. 📸 Rules: no photos or videos inside the temple at all, and no drones anywhere without permission. You can take photos and videos outside though.   👕 Dress Code: shoulders, chest, and knees must be covered. No shorts, crop tops, or sleeveless shirts. If needed, they’ll give you wraps at the entrance.   👟 Shoes: you’ll need to remove your shoes before going inside. 💧 It can get pretty hot, so bring water and take your time walking around. Let me know in the comments if you have any questions! 👇 #california #losangeles #hindutemple #india #travel things to do in California | Indian temple near Los Angeles California

A few weeks ago I posted a DIY garden path that ended up getting over 500,000 views. Some people loved it. Some people hated it. The biggest criticism was the amount of plastic left underneath the concrete stepping stones. At first I thought it probably wasn't that bad. Then I took everything apart. Turns out there was a lot more plastic under there than I realized. So I'm fixing it. Part 3 is coming soon, and this time I'm trying a different approach between the stones. Have you ever had a DIY project that looked great at first but needed a second chance? #stepingstones #concrete #gardenproject #diyproject #fyp
